title: 8 Herbal Creams For Hair Fall
description: Urtica dioica creams contains active constituents like histamine, lectins, and saponins, which are responsible for its benefits. Histamine in Urtica dioica creams stimulates blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. The saponins in the cream have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce inflammation and soothe an itchy scalp, creating an ideal environment for hair growth.
